Hi [Recipient],  

Thanks for the update. As per the tracking, the estimated delivery is 6/27, and the transit period seems quite long. It may be due to the long holiday period here from 6/22 to 6/25. I will follow up further and ask for your support where needed.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
Uni-Eastern Mfg. Co. Ltd | Taiwan, Taipei #114 | 2F, No. 16, Lane 35, Ji-Hu Road.  
Tel: [Phone Number] / Mobile: [Phone Number] / Skype: [Skype Username] / WeChat: [WeChat Username]  

---

**How to reply to this email:**  

You can respond politely, acknowledging the update and offering your support. Here's a sample response:

Subject: Re: Delivery Update  

Dear [Sender's Name],

Please feel free to reach out if any further support is needed. I'm happy to assist wherever required.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Company]  
[Your Contact Information]  

---
